overview.description: The GSK plc ADRhedged (GSKH) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the GSK plc - Benchmark Price Return index. The fund provides exposure to GSK plc ADR, while using swaps to hedge daily currency fluctuations. The fund aims to provide the total return performance of GSK plc, in its local market, to US investors. GSKH was launched on Jan 3, 2025 and is issued by ADRhedged.
